MDCD_OPTNL_CVRG_ADLT_POP_IND 
LABEL: 
Eligible Population Indicator: Medicaid Optional Coverage Adult-Children — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates if the managed care entity is authorized to enroll the family/adult eligibility groups; ever in 
the calendar year.
